name: kronia
description: KRONIA — Sistema de Gestão Fisiológica e Periodização

scripts.test:chat: node --import tsx --test tests/unit/chat-api-cta-inference.test.js tests/unit/chat-cta-delegation.test.js tests/unit/chat-intent-labs.test.js tests/unit/chat-pending-intent.test.js tests/unit/chat-rag-fallback.test.ts tests/unit/conversation-cta-render.test.js tests/unit/conversation-cta.test.js tests/unit/intent-pipeline-edge-cases.test.js tests/unit/training-intent-hydration.test.js
scripts.system:check: sh -c 'if command -v tsx >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsx scripts/system-check.ts; else npm run -s system:check:legacy; fi'
scripts.system:check:legacy: tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module node16 --moduleResolution node16 --lib ES2020,DOM --types node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-system-check scripts/system-check.ts src/lib/checks/*.ts src/lib/utils/env.ts && node .tmp-system-check/scripts/system-check.js
scripts.release:readiness: sh -c 'if command -v tsx >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsx scripts/release-readiness.ts; else npm run -s release:readiness:legacy; fi'
scripts.release:readiness:legacy: tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module node16 --moduleResolution node16 --lib ES2020,DOM --types node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-release-readiness scripts/release-readiness.ts && node .tmp-release-readiness/release-readiness.js
scripts.launch:gate: npm run system:check && npm run release:readiness
scripts.monitor:postdeploy: sh -c 'if command -v tsx >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsx scripts/post-deploy-monitor.ts; else npm run -s monitor:postdeploy:legacy; fi'
scripts.monitor:postdeploy:legacy: tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module node16 --moduleResolution node16 --lib ES2020,DOM --types node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-post-deploy-monitor scripts/post-deploy-monitor.ts && node .tmp-post-deploy-monitor/post-deploy-monitor.js
